title: <div><tt>| SATURATOR     | The Firetongue      | Adds harmonic blood
content:
| SATURATOR | The Firetongue | Adds harmonic blood | Emotion overload |
| FOLD | The Fractalist | Breaks symmetry | Creative collapse |
| DRIVE | The Hammer | Signal push | Aggression spike |
| GATE | The Gatekeeper | Passes or blocks | Binary entry |
| TRIGGER | The Spark | Instant action | Ritual ignition |
| REVERB | The Veil | Space and myth trail | Echo of otherworlds |
| SHIMMER | The Angel's Path | High pitch glow | Divinity enhancer |
| DELAY | The Mirror Chain | Time reflection | Past looped |
| GLITCH | The Screamer | System corruption | Pattern interruptor |
| FREEZE | The Stasis Node | Holds time | Immortality trap |
